CurrentInfo.description: Current prediction/observation information for API responses.

direction.description: Direction of current (Enum: CurrentDirection, null if non-tidal)

magnitude_pct.description: Relative current strength (0.0-1.0, null if non-tidal), normalized against the peak within the current continuous flood or ebb segment in the available prediction curve.
magnitude_pct.title: Magnitude Pct

phase.description: Compact current phase for displays. Tidal prediction values are flood, ebb, slack_before_flood, slack_before_ebb, or slack. Slack phases are assigned when absolute current magnitude is below 0.2 knots; slack_before_* indicates the next non-slack direction predicted by the curve.

source_type.description: Indicates if data is prediction or observation (Enum: DataSourceType)

state_description.description: Display-ready current state phrase, such as 'strong ebb and building' or 'slack before flood' (null if non-tidal).
state_description.title: State Description

strength.description: Cycle-relative current strength for non-slack tidal predictions (light, moderate, or strong). Null for slack or non-tidal currents.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the prediction (in location's local timezone)
timestamp.title: Timestamp

trend.description: Current trend for non-slack tidal predictions (building, easing, or steady). Null for slack or non-tidal currents.

CurrentInfo.title: CurrentInfo

CurrentPhase.description: Compact current phase for API consumers and displays.
CurrentPhase.title: CurrentPhase

CurrentTrend.description: Whether the current is building or easing.
CurrentTrend.title: CurrentTrend

CurrentsResponse.description: Complete response for currents API endpoint.

current_chart_filename.description: Filename of the current chart image (only for locations with chart assets)
current_chart_filename.title: Current Chart Filename

legacy_chart.description: Legacy chart info (only for locations with chart assets)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the prediction (in location's local timezone)
timestamp.title: Timestamp

CurrentsResponse.title: CurrentsResponse

DataFrameSummary.description: Provides summary statistics for a time-series DataFrame.

index_frequency.description: Inferred frequency of the DataFrame index (e.g., 'H', 'D', 'T'). None if irregular.
index_frequency.title: Index Frequency

index_newest.description: Newest timestamp in the DataFrame index (timezone-naive). None if empty/non-datetime index.
index_newest.title: Index Newest

index_oldest.description: Oldest timestamp in the DataFrame index (timezone-naive). None if empty/non-datetime index.
index_oldest.title: Index Oldest

length.description: Number of rows in the DataFrame.
length.title: Length

memory_usage_bytes.description: Total memory usage of the DataFrame in bytes (including index, deep=True).
memory_usage_bytes.title: Memory Usage Bytes

missing_values.description: Dictionary mapping column names to the count of missing values.
missing_values.title: Missing Values

width.description: Number of columns in the DataFrame.
width.title: Width

DataFrameSummary.title: DataFrameSummary

DataSourceType.description: Indicates whether data is based on a prediction or an observation.
DataSourceType.title: DataSourceType

FeedStatus.description: Represents the status of a single data feed.

age_seconds.description: Data age in seconds at the time of status check
age_seconds.title: Age Seconds

data_summary.description: Summary statistics of the feed's DataFrame, if available

error.description: Last error message encountered by the feed, if any
error.title: Error

expiration_seconds.description: Configured expiration time in seconds for the feed
expiration_seconds.title: Expiration Seconds

fetch_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the last successful data fetch (naive UTC)
fetch_timestamp.title: Fetch Timestamp

is_expired.description: Whether the data is considered expired
is_expired.title: Is Expired

is_healthy.description: Whether the data is recent enough to be considered healthy
is_healthy.title: Is Healthy

location.description: Location code associated with the feed
location.title: Location

FeedStatus.title: FeedStatus

LegacyChartInfo.description: Information about legacy tide charts for API responses.

hours_since_last_tide.description: Hours since the last tide event
hours_since_last_tide.title: Hours Since Last Tide

LegacyChartInfo.title: LegacyChartInfo

LocationConditions.description:
Complete response for location conditions endpoint.

Fields are conditionally included based on the location's configuration:
- temperature: Only included if the location has a temperature source with live_enabled=True
- tides: Only included if the location has a tide source
- current: Only included if the location has a current source
LocationConditions.title: LocationConditions

LocationStatus.description: Represents the status of all feeds for a specific location.

feeds.description: Dictionary mapping feed names to their FeedStatus objects.
feeds.title: Feeds

LocationStatus.title: LocationStatus

LocationSummary.description: Summary information for a swimming location.

has_data.description: Whether the location can serve data
has_data.title: Has Data

LocationSummary.title: LocationSummary

station_name.description: Human-readable name of the temperature station
station_name.title: Station Name

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the reading (in location's local timezone)
timestamp.title: Timestamp

TemperatureInfo.title: TemperatureInfo

TideEntry.description: Individual tide information for API responses.

time.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the tide event (in location's local timezone)
time.title: Time

TideEntry.title: TideEntry

TideInfo.description: Collection of tide information for API responses.

state.description: Point-in-time estimated tide state, null when the derived tide curve is unavailable

TideInfo.title: TideInfo

TideState.description: Point-in-time estimated tide state for API responses.

estimated_height.description: Estimated tide height in feet, derived from the available tide prediction curve
estimated_height.title: Estimated Height

height_pct.description: Estimated normalized tide height from 0.0 to 1.0 between the surrounding low/high tide range; null when unavailable
height_pct.title: Height Pct

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the tide-state estimate in the location's local timezone
timestamp.title: Timestamp

trend.description: Estimated tide trend at the timestamp

TideState.title: TideState

TideTrend.description: Whether the tide height is rising or falling.
TideTrend.title: TideTrend

get.description:
Redirect root path to default location (NYC).

TODO: Use cookies to redirect to last used or saved location.

Serve a landing page showing all swimming locations with their current water temperatures.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request object

Returns:
    HTML response with all locations and their water temperatures
Return non-secret presentation metadata for the React app.

API endpoint for service health check (used by Cloud Run).

Returns 200 if at least one location can serve data (fresh or stale).
Returns 503 only if NO location has any data available.

This lenient check ensures single station outages don't mark the entire
service unhealthy. For detailed per-feed health status, use /api/status.

Returns:
    True if service can serve at least one location
    Status code 200 if healthy, 503 if not healthy

schema.title: Response Healthy Status Api Health Get

get.description:
API endpoint for service health check (used by Cloud Run).

Returns 200 if at least one location can serve data (fresh or stale).
Returns 503 only if NO location has any data available.

This lenient check ensures single station outages don't mark the entire
service unhealthy. For detailed per-feed health status, use /api/status.

Returns:
    True if service can serve at least one location
    Status code 200 if healthy, 503 if not healthy

schema.title: Response Healthy Status Api Healthy Get

get.description:
API endpoint that returns a list of all configured swimming locations.

Returns a summary of each location including code, name, coordinates,
and whether data is currently available.

Returns:
    List of LocationSummary objects for all configured locations

schema.title: Response List Locations Api Locations Get

get.description:
API endpoint that returns status information for all configured locations.

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping location codes to their status dictionaries

Raises:
    HTTPException: If no locations are configured

schema.title: Response All Locations Status Api Status Get

get.description:
API endpoint that returns tide and temperature data for a specific location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')

Returns:
    JSON response with tide and temperature information

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured

API endpoint that returns current predictions for a specific location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')
    shift: Time shift in minutes from current time (optional)

Returns:
    CurrentsResponse object with current prediction details

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured or doesn't support currents

Generate and serve a tide and current plot for the specified location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., "nyc", "san")
    shift: Time shift in minutes from current time

Returns:
    SVG image response with tide and current visualization

Serve a historic temperature plot for the specified location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., "nyc", "sfo")
    period: Time period - "2mo" for 2-month or "12mo" for full year

Returns:
    SVG image response with historic temperature visualization

Serve the live temperature plot for the specified location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., "nyc", "sfo")

Returns:
    SVG image response with live temperature visualization

API endpoint that returns status information for a specific location.

Args:
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')

Returns:
    Status dictionary for the specified location

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured

Redirect /embed to the default location embed page (NYC).

Returns:
    Redirect response to the NYC embed page
Serve crawler directives for the canonical site.
Serve a sitemap of canonical, indexable pages.

Serve the main page for a specific location.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request object
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')

Returns:
    HTML response with location-specific configuration

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured

Serve the water current visualization page for the specified location.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request object
    location: Location code (e.g., "nyc", "san")
    shift: Time shift in minutes from current time

Returns:
    HTML response with current water conditions

Serve the embed view for a specific location for embedding in other websites.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request object
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')

Returns:
    HTML response with location-specific embed

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured

Serve a widget view for a specific location.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request object
    location: Location code (e.g., 'nyc')

Returns:
    HTML response with location-specific widget

Raises:
    HTTPException: If the location is not configured
